variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 12821 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 12821 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 12821 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 101.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 73.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 33.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 70.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 62.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 3.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P786889 Air Filter, Primary Obround | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12821
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P786889 Air Filter, Primary Obround | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12821
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P786889 Air Filter, Primary Obround is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 10 015 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12821
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter C 10 015 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12821
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.
specifications: Style: Air Filter, Dimension A: 102.0 mm, Dimension D: 74.0 mm, Dimension H: 70.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF25472 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12821
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF25472 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12821
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF25472 axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
